message:
feat(fwc): add test observability contract module (94 tests)

Implement shared test observability contract for all fwc validation layers:
- ScenarioId schema (layer:suite:case), TraceId (UUID), ScenarioContext
- Structured TraceEntry log envelope with levels, categories, fields
- TraceLog with filtering, summary stats, JSONL export
- ArtifactBundle layout and ArtifactManifest for scenario run outputs
- RedactionEngine with default secret patterns and SHA-256 digest correlation
- ReplayEnvelope capturing full environment for deterministic replay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
